name: Penn Yan Racquet Club
description: Penn Yan Racquet Club is a place to play pickleball in Penn Yan, NY. There are 4 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Penn Yan Village Boat Launch
description: These courts look like they have been newly surfaced. The nets and fencing all look pretty new as well. Plenty of parking and a restroom building. Parking is shared with the boat launch. There is also a tennis court located here with pickleball lines painted on it.
